docket_entries.description: UNLAWFUL DETAINER - RESIDENTIAL, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF PUSHKAROW, ANTONINA, AS TRUSTEE AS TO DEFENDANT PUSHKAROW, TANIA MARIE DOES 1 TO 10 SUMMONS ISSUED
